{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/22666538?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/omkhar", "id": 22666538, "login": "omkhar", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIyNjY2NTM4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54517", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary
In `BeanDeserializer._deserializeUsingPropertyBased`, the active-view (`@JsonView`) filter was applied only to creator properties; the regular property-buffering branch performed no `prop.visibleInView(activeView)` check. A change making `SetterlessProperty.isMerging()` return `true` routed setterless Collection/Map properties through this unguarded path, so a setterless collection annotated with a restricted `@JsonView` is populated from attacker JSON even when the active view excludes it.

## Impact
View-restricted (e.g. admin-only) setterless collection/map properties can be written from untrusted JSON despite `@JsonView` gating — an access-control / mass-assignment bypass. No RCE or DoS.

## Affected / Patched (verified via `git tag --contains`)
- 2.21 line: `>= 2.21.0, < 2.21.4` -> fixed in **2.21.4** (backport `94c5d21`, #5970)
- 3.x line: `>= 3.0.0, < 3.1.4` -> fixed in **3.1.4** (#5969, `5bf23ed`)

## Severity / CWE
Maintainer: minor. Reporter: HIGH. CWE-863 (Incorrect Authorization); related CWE-1220.

## Credits
Omkhar Arasaratnam (@omkhar) - finder.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00237, "percentile": 0.14545}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5hh8-q8hv-fr38", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T21:24:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5hh8-q8hv-fr38", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5hh8-q8hv-fr38"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54517"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-23T21:24:50Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/security/advisories/GHSA-5hh8-q8hv-fr38", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/pull/5969", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/pull/5970", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/commit/5bf23edb4221f7dd2ec8e71ff6d26c61640f261d", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/commit/94c5d215b3af1505098c686405d9641f041a9962", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5hh8-q8hv-fr38"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FasterXML/jackson-databind/security-advisories/GHSA-5hh8-q8hv-fr38", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind", "summary": "jackson-databind has @JsonView bypass for setterless creator properties", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T21:24:50Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5hh8-q8hv-fr38", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.21.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.21.0, < 2.21.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "tools.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: jackson-databind has @JsonView bypass for setterless creator properties
